\tzpentry{ID4392}{Current Density Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4392 introduces Current Density Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \frac{\partial \mathcal{J}}{\partial \theta_j}(\bm{\theta}^*) = 0 \quad \text{for all components } \theta_j \text{ of } \bm{\theta}. \]
